description: A smiling woman in a blue and green patterned swimsuit and black shorts stands barefoot on a tiled floor in a locker room or changing area. She is pulling on the waistband of her shorts, looking to her left. Her long, dark hair is down. A pair of pink and white flip-flops are on the floor to her right. The room has a row of individual changing stalls with white doors, a blue ceiling, and yellow accents. A red chair is visible to the far left.
location_context: Indoors, likely a public facility such as a swimming pool or gym changing room.
